entities.name: Information Standstill
entities.context: AI automation paradigm where processing power is wasted moving data between unread silos, decoupling information volume from human understanding

entities.name: Jevons Paradox
entities.context: Economic principle: as processing becomes more efficient, we produce more low-value data rather than saving time

entities.name: Automated Synthesis and Filtration
entities.context: Proposed design focus for software - filtering for relevance and synthesizing rather than merely delivering information

entities.name: Cognitive Load
entities.context: Mental burden on consumers that tools should reduce, not increase through noise

relationships.context: Information Standstill is described as a manifestation of Jevons Paradox applied to AI automation
Proposed solution to counter Information Standstill - shift from automated delivery to synthesis
Goal is to reduce cognitive load rather than increase processed data volume
